My business is not as busy as i need it to be. Ive had more people schedule and NOT show up which cost me money. I can’t afford the extra money and I’m also trying to work another fulltime job.
Hey Misti

I genuinely want to understand what's going on and how I can help make this right for you. Could you tell me what's concerning you? I think a conversation would be really helpful here. Please call me at +1 978-312-5094, …

We're handling the backend stuff on our end, but for your Zoca landing page services, this is definitely the fastest way to get it done.

I did see where some have been updated. There are other items I had suggested to be updated. Which are removing all things related to tattoos and body art. I have moved my salon space.
